## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated (known-answer vectors where applicable)
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies
- [ ] Public API unchanged, or `PublicApi.approved.txt` updated intentionally (explain below)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] Builds clean (warnings-as-errors) and CI is green
